arts.ttl: Leeds United line-up vs Preston as forwards fall short plus full-back reshuffle
arts.sum: Understandably, Daniel Farke was not able to give definitive answers on several Leeds United players with another training session to go before tomorrow’s Preston North End clash. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Paul Heckingbottom's Leeds United claim misses the point as Whites fact ignored
arts.sum: The ex-Whites boss is frustrated a Wednesday night fixture away in Cardiff for his team is followed by a 12:30pm Saturday lunchtime game, giving Preston little time to prepare for the match. Preston North End manager Paul Heckingbottom has hit out at the scheduling that sees his side have a day less preparation for their early kick-off with Leeds United .

arts.ttl: Preston v Leeds: Team news, Sky Sports update, referee confirmed
arts.sum: Up next is a fixture that presented issues for Daniel Farke last season, a trip to Deepdale to take on Preston. Leeds United take on Preston North End away from home this weekend looking to make it three wins on the bounce to remain the top two.

arts.ttl: Bogle starts, Joseph decision: Leeds United predicted XI to face Preston
arts.sum: Leeds United travel to Lancashire this weekend as they take on Preston, looking for a third successive Championship win. Home clashes against Derby County and Middlesbrough provided the perfect response to Leeds’ last away trip, winning twice to return to the top two and create a three-point gap all of a sudden.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke drops cheeky dig at Leeds United’s rivals with attendance comment
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke is well aware of the threat that is going to be posed by Preston at Deepdale tomorrow afternoon, an away fixture that promises a test for his side to keep up their winning form. It may seem a tad egotistical and ‘woe is me’ when Leeds fans suggest that they have the added challenge each weekend of being every team in the division’s biggest game of the season.

arts.ttl: Confirmed: Two fresh doubts for Leeds United, late tests imminent as key positions take big hit
arts.sum: Leeds team news: Late tests for Max Wöber, Sam Byram, Jayden Bogle Leeds United make the trip to Preston this weekend with full-backs on the team news agenda for Daniel Farke after victory over Middlesbrough.

arts.ttl: Leeds United forced to make late selection call as injury worries named for Preston clash
arts.sum: The Whites are bidding for a third win inside a week, but a busy schedule has brought with it a number of knocks and some fitness concerns as players recently back from injury try to navigate their way through. Leeds United will assess the fitness of a host of players after today's final training session with manager Daniel Farke hopeful of limited disruption this weekend despite concerns over a number of players.

arts.ttl: Leeds United ace urged to join Championship rivals in January
arts.sum: Leeds United attacker Joe Gelhardt has been linked with a move away from the club in recent weeks. The striker needs to leave the Whites in order to play regular first-team football and Carlton Palmer has urged him to join Plymouth Argyle. Speaking to Football League World, Palmer said: “There are a lot of good clubs for […] The post Leeds United ace urged to join Championship rivals in January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Lacks a bit of running' Leeds United winger decision explained ahead of Preston
arts.sum: The Italian scored the opening goal and was one of the best players in the first half, but was taken off before the 70th minute by the manager. Tiring legs and a lack of running in behind were two of the reasons why Daniel Farke pulled Wilfried Gnonto out of Tuesday’s Leeds United win early.

arts.ttl: Leeds United target set to be available in January, but there’s a major issue
arts.sum: Leeds United were in the hunt to sign Manchester City attacking midfielder James McAtee during the summer window, but failed as Pep Guardiola kept him in the squad, and now he could be looking at a January exit instead. Leeds target McAtee likely to leave Man City, but Premier League interest gives Whites no chance
